title: Louisiana Tech university alumnus shares his thoughts on going to college 🏛️🎓 #shorts #filmmajor
body: If you are interested in learning more ways to maximize your odds of getting accepted and getting scholarships, sign up here to watch our free training 👉 https://bestcollegeaidusa.com/registration-free-training?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=linkinbio&utm_content=6steps
author: @BestCollegeAidUSA

title: Why did you choose Louisiana Tech University?
body: I’ve toured 6 colleges all across the south (Alabama , Mississippi and Louisiana) from big to small, and LA Tech felt like home. Everyone felt like they wanted to be there. The tour guides kept it 100 with me and my friend who was also touring. The professors seemed super accommodating and just wanted to make sure we spent our money wisely and that we were prepared to come to college. Never once did I hear anyone on campus bash another college. Except for the clock tower, having the number 4 spelt wrong in Roman numerals (courtesy of ULM students 😂). Generally great experience for a smaller university.
author: @mannipannee8844

title: Self applying journey to Louisiana tech University| Scholarship| COA| Winter intake| Nepali student

title: The Renovations NEEDED For A New Conference...(LOUISIANA TECH ALL ACCESS)
body: Cool video.  I grew up in Ruston 40 years ago so it's interesting to see how things have changed.  Kind of fun fact about the Lady Techsters; back in the day when they were so good they had Debra Rodman as one of their players.  Yep, sister of Dennis and she was about as flaky as he is.  At one point she simply disappeared for awhile and someone found her enrolled at a beauty school down the road.  They got her back to Tech and I think that was one of their Final Four maybe NC teams.
author: @fudgenuggets405

title: The Renovations NEEDED For A New Conference...(LOUISIANA TECH ALL ACCESS)
body: The LA Tech Bulldogs are another underrated FBS team because of other teams like the LSU Tigers and Tulane Green Wave being more popular it seems. Even so they have cool facilities and an interesting logo. Also the fact Terry Bradshaw one of the best NFL players of all time went there is so cool. Also Karl Malone and Tramon Williams also went to LA Tech which is just a cool bonus.
author: @SSBFan33-u3m

title: The Renovations NEEDED For A New Conference...(LOUISIANA TECH ALL ACCESS)
body: Back in the 80's, Tech had some really good baseball teams.  They had a two-year stretch with David Segui, longtime Baltimore Oriole, and Charlie Montoya, former Blue Jays manager.  Our high school was just a couple of blocks away so we would walk down there for games and you could sit on top of the dugout without a ticket.  Saw Tech beat LSU who had Albert Belle that year in one of the best college baseball games I've ever seen.
author: @fudgenuggets405

body: Lagniappe means "a little extra treat" or "additional amount".  When you order something and get an extra french fry or a little extra meat, that's lagniappe.  It does not mean year book.
